_publications._publicationTitle: p21-Activated kinases are required for transformation in a cell-based model of neurofibromatosis type 2.

_contextSnippet: ΔBB cells developed substantial tumors by 6 weeks post-injection (average volume >200 mm³)...Tumors derived from ΔBB/PID cells were much smaller in size, with an average volume of 38 mm³
details: ΔBB cells developed substantial tumors by 6 weeks (average volume >200 mm³), while ΔBB/PID tumors were much smaller (average volume 38 mm³)
